mapper.select:
SELECT nv.ma_nhan_vien, nv.ho_ten, nv.ngay_sinh, nv.gioi_tinh, nv.hoat_dong,
-- CHỨC VỤ cv.ma_phong_ban, cv.ten_chuc_vu, cv.ngay_ap_dung AS cv_ngay_ap_dung,
-- PHÒNG BAN pb.ma_phong_ban AS pb_ma_phong_ban, pb.ten_phong_ban AS pb_ten_phong_ban, pb.loai_phong,
-- XẾP BẬC LƯƠNG xl.ma_bac_luong, xl.ngay_ap_dung AS xl_ngay_ap_dung,
-- BẬC LƯƠNG bl.ma_bac_luong AS bl_ma_bac_luong, bl.ten_bac_luong, bl.muc_luong_co_ban
FROM nhan_vien nv
LEFT JOIN chuc_vu cv ON nv.ma_nhan_vien = cv.ma_nhan_vien AND cv.ngay_ap_dung = ( SELECT MAX(cv2.ngay_ap_dung) FROM chuc_vu cv2 WHERE cv2.ma_nhan_vien = nv.ma_nhan_vien )
LEFT JOIN phong_ban pb ON pb.ma_phong_ban = cv.ma_phong_ban
LEFT JOIN xep_bac_luong xl ON nv.ma_nhan_vien = xl.ma_nhan_vien AND xl.ngay_ap_dung = ( SELECT MAX(xl2.ngay_ap_dung) FROM xep_bac_luong xl2 WHERE xl2.ma_nhan_vien = nv.ma_nhan_vien )
LEFT JOIN bac_luong bl ON bl.ma_bac_luong = xl.ma_bac_luong;

SELECT nv.ma_nhan_vien, nv.ho_ten, nv.ngay_sinh, nv.gioi_tinh, nv.hoat_dong,
-- CHỨC VỤ cv.ma_phong_ban, cv.ten_chuc_vu, cv.ngay_ap_dung AS cv_ngay_ap_dung,
-- PHÒNG BAN pb.ma_phong_ban AS pb_ma_phong_ban, pb.ten_phong_ban AS pb_ten_phong_ban, pb.loai_phong,
-- XẾP BẬC LƯƠNG xl.ma_bac_luong, xl.ngay_ap_dung AS xl_ngay_ap_dung,
-- BẬC LƯƠNG bl.ma_bac_luong AS bl_ma_bac_luong, bl.ten_bac_luong, bl.muc_luong_co_ban
FROM nhan_vien nv
LEFT JOIN chuc_vu cv ON nv.ma_nhan_vien = cv.ma_nhan_vien AND cv.ngay_ap_dung = ( SELECT MAX(cv2.ngay_ap_dung) FROM chuc_vu cv2 WHERE cv2.ma_nhan_vien = nv.ma_nhan_vien )
LEFT JOIN phong_ban pb ON pb.ma_phong_ban = cv.ma_phong_ban
LEFT JOIN xep_bac_luong xl ON nv.ma_nhan_vien = xl.ma_nhan_vien AND xl.ngay_ap_dung = ( SELECT MAX(xl2.ngay_ap_dung) FROM xep_bac_luong xl2 WHERE xl2.ma_nhan_vien = nv.ma_nhan_vien )
LEFT JOIN bac_luong bl ON bl.ma_bac_luong = xl.ma_bac_luong
WHERE nv.ma_nhan_vien = #{maNv};

SELECT nv.ma_nhan_vien, nv.ho_ten, nv.ngay_sinh, nv.gioi_tinh, nv.hoat_dong,
-- CHỨC VỤ cv.ma_phong_ban, cv.ten_chuc_vu, cv.ngay_ap_dung AS cv_ngay_ap_dung,
-- PHÒNG BAN pb.ma_phong_ban AS pb_ma_phong_ban, pb.ten_phong_ban AS pb_ten_phong_ban, pb.loai_phong,
-- XẾP BẬC LƯƠNG xl.ma_bac_luong, xl.ngay_ap_dung AS xl_ngay_ap_dung,
-- BẬC LƯƠNG bl.ma_bac_luong AS bl_ma_bac_luong, bl.ten_bac_luong, bl.muc_luong_co_ban
FROM nhan_vien nv
LEFT JOIN chuc_vu cv ON nv.ma_nhan_vien = cv.ma_nhan_vien AND cv.ngay_ap_dung = ( SELECT MAX(cv2.ngay_ap_dung) FROM chuc_vu cv2 WHERE cv2.ma_nhan_vien = nv.ma_nhan_vien )
LEFT JOIN phong_ban pb ON pb.ma_phong_ban = cv.ma_phong_ban
LEFT JOIN xep_bac_luong xl ON nv.ma_nhan_vien = xl.ma_nhan_vien AND xl.ngay_ap_dung = ( SELECT MAX(xl2.ngay_ap_dung) FROM xep_bac_luong xl2 WHERE xl2.ma_nhan_vien = nv.ma_nhan_vien )
LEFT JOIN bac_luong bl ON bl.ma_bac_luong = xl.ma_bac_luong WHERE cv.ma_phong_ban = #{maPhongBan};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nhan_vien (ma_nhan_vien, ho_ten, ngay_sinh, gioi_tinh) VALUES (#{maNhanVien}, #{hoTen}, #{ngaySinh}, #{gioiTinh})
INSERT INTO chuc_vu (ma_nhan_vien, ma_phong_ban, ten_chuc_vu, ngay_ap_dung) VALUES (#{maNhanVien}, #{maPhongBan}, #{tenChucVu}, #{ngayApDung})
INSERT INTO xep_bac_luong (ma_nhan_vien, ma_bac_luong, ngay_ap_dung) VALUES (#{maNhanVien}, #{maBacLuong}, #{ngayApDung})
